narrative:
Walton Hills City has 1,730 registered voters, with 50.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.9%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.6 percentage points.
